description: HIV group: HIV False (No Test)  [norm_bool(mathivtest) == FALSE]
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND norm_bool(mathivtest) == FALSE
normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND norm_bool(mathivtest) == TRUE

description: HIV group: HIV True & Reactive  [tested == TRUE & hivtestresult == "R"]
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND tested == TRUE & result_norm == "Reactive"

description: HIV group: HIV True & Non-Reactive  [tested == TRUE & hivtestresult == "NR"]
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND tested == TRUE & result_norm == "Non-Reactive"

description: HIV group: HIV True & Unknown result  [tested == TRUE & result_norm is Unknown/NA]
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND tested == TRUE & (result_norm == "Unknown" | is.na(result_norm))

description: NOTE: HIV True sub-groups (Reactive/Non-Reactive/Unknown) sum to HIV True (Tested) — groups are NOT mutually exclusive
Analysis population with valid birthweight (LBW sample)
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg
normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND NOT (is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg)

description: Analysis population with valid SGA classification
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg AND !is.na(gestation) & gestation >= 24 wks & gestation <= 42 wks AND !is.na(sga_category)

description: Discarded for SGA (Missing both BW and GA)
